title: Flutes V5 Packet Scaffold

readiness.label: L1_packet_v5_explorer_scaffold
readiness.summary: Multi-flute packet scaffold with explicit family split. Historical workbook and build-registry evidence exist, and F4/A4/C5 public rows now have a sanitized extraction plus aggregate comparison, but current measured tuning gates remain open before V5 build-packet candidate wording.

stash_catalog_check.result: flutes had a stashed untracked explorer.html from repo-hygiene-20260518-after-lock-clean; it was inspected as a legacy scan and left preserved in the stash because this lane needed a Round 31 issue #3 family-split scaffold.

remaining_unknowns: Selected F4/A4/C5 workbook rows are exported into public CSV form, but they remain unvalidated for fabrication.
At least one built flute per selected key still needs current measured fundamental and six-hole tuning.
PVC proof row requires actual stock measurement before geometry is computed.
Legacy SolidWorks models need normalization and mapping to design-table parameters.
Future MCP-generated V5 assets need real session IDs in CAD/mcp-session-log.md.
